metadata.description: BDD behavior-test generation flow as reusable, config-driven skills (SKILL.md open standard).

plugins.name: bdd-kit
plugins.description: spec<->impl<->feature BDD flow: setup, bootstrap, new-feature, sync, drift, implement. Config-driven via bdd-kit.config.yaml; framework-agnostic (playwright web, Flutter bdd_widget_test + Patrol).
